report.summary: UX audit of 6 recently added pages — fixed badges metadata and breadcrumb, standardized ecosystem breadcrumbs with JSON-LD, created badges OG image, and added loading skeletons for ecosystem hub and badges page.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added Breadcrumb component with JSON-LD structured data to badges/page.tsx (was missing entirely)
Replaced inline manual breadcrumb in ecosystem/uniswap/page.tsx with Breadcrumb component (adds JSON-LD)
Replaced inline manual breadcrumb in ecosystem/aave/page.tsx with Breadcrumb component (adds JSON-LD)
Added loading.tsx shimmer skeleton to ecosystem hub (12-card grid with search bar and filter tabs)
Added loading.tsx shimmer skeleton to badges page (8-badge grid with XP progress bar)
Fixed badges page missing openGraph.images and twitter card metadata

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: badges (1200x630) — three glowing badge circles (DeFi Scholar, On-Chain Pro, OG Degen) with stats panel and recent badges row, degen0x brand gradient

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Logged for Future Sprints)
items: HIGH: 80+ ecosystem subpages marked use client but are purely presentational — should be server components for smaller JS bundles and proper metadata exports
HIGH: 80+ ecosystem subpages have no Metadata export — social shares fall back to root OG image. Needs generateMetadata() or per-page exports
MEDIUM: Ecosystem guide pages use hardcoded inline styles with fixed pixel font sizes (8-14px) — should migrate to Tailwind for responsive consistency
MEDIUM: No loading.tsx files for daily-challenge, courses, or individual ecosystem subpages
LOW: Fixed padding on ecosystem guides (48px top) could be reduced on mobile for better space utilization
